allow:
Bash(powershell -Command "
  Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
  
  \\$skills = @\('revenue-manager', 'marketing-campaign-builder', 'sdr-sales', 'financial-analyst', 'brand-strategist', 'hr-recruiter', 'operations-manager', 'legal-drafting'\)
  
  foreach \(\\$skill in \\$skills\) {
    \\$zip = \\"D:\\Prometheus\\skills\\\\\\$skill.skill\\"
    \\$dest = \\"D:\\Prometheus\\workspace\\skills\\\\\\$skill\\"
    
    Write-Host \\"Processing \\$skill...\\"
    New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path \\$dest -Force | Out-Null
    [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::ExtractToDirectory\(\\$zip, \\$dest, \\$true\)
    Write-Host \\"  ✓ Extracted\\"
  }
  Write-Host \\"Done!\\"
")

Bash(powershell -Command "
  Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
  
  \\$skills = @\('revenue-manager', 'marketing-campaign-builder', 'sdr-sales', 'financial-analyst', 'brand-strategist', 'hr-recruiter', 'operations-manager', 'legal-drafting'\)
  
  foreach \(\\$skill in \\$skills\) {
    \\$zip = \\"D:\\Prometheus\\skills\\\\\\$skill.skill\\"
    \\$dest = \\"D:\\Prometheus\\workspace\\skills\\\\\\$skill\\"
    
    Write-Host \\"Extracting \\$skill...\\"
    New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path \\$dest -Force | Out-Null
    [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::ExtractToDirectory\(\\$zip, \\$dest\)
    Write-Host \\"  ✓ Done\\"
  }
")

Bash(powershell -Command '
  Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
  
  $skills = @\("revenue-manager", "marketing-campaign-builder", "sdr-sales", "financial-analyst", "brand-strategist", "hr-recruiter", "operations-manager", "legal-drafting"\)
  
  foreach \($skill in $skills\) {
    $zip = "D:\\Prometheus\\skills\\$skill.skill"
    $dest = "D:\\Prometheus\\workspace\\skills\\$skill"
    
    Write-Host "Extracting $skill..."
    New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dest -Force | Out-Null
    [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::ExtractToDirectory\($zip, $dest\)
    Write-Host "  ✓ Done"
  }
')
Bash(awk '/case.*dispatch_team_agent/,/^      case/ {if \(/^      case/ && !/dispatch_team_agent/\) exit; print NR": "$0}' src/gateway/agents-runtime/subagent-executor.ts)
